rules.summary: Liability may be uncapped or very broad.
rules.why_risky: Potential damages may exceed contract value or expected exposure.
rules.suggested_question: Can liability be capped, mutual, and linked to fees paid, with clear exclusions?
false_positive_checks: check if broad language is limited by a later liability cap
check exclusions only apply to serious misconduct or IP/data claims

rules.summary: Indemnity may be one-sided or broader than necessary.
rules.why_risky: One party may take responsibility for broad claims without matching protection.
rules.suggested_question: Can indemnity be mutual, fault-based, limited to third-party claims, and tied to the liability cap?
false_positive_checks: check whether it only covers third-party claims caused by breach
